source: Everest Group GCC State of the Market 2024 + NASSCOM GCC Report 2024 + WNS/Genpact FY25 annual reports
NASSCOM GCC Report 2024: India GCC average revenue/FTE $26,000-$35,000. Everest Group 2024: top-quartile GCCs at $40,000+
NASSCOM Strategic Review 2025: IT/GCC sector attrition normalised to 16-19% after FY23 peak. Everest Group 2024 GCC survey.
NASSCOM GCC 2024: Tier-1 India city cost per seat ₹14,000-₹25,000/month. Bengaluru/Hyderabad CBD ₹20,000-₹28,000, Tier-2 cities ₹10,000-₹15,000.
WNS FY25 annual report: utilisation 83%. Genpact FY25: ~80%. Everest Group: top-quartile GCCs at 85%+.
NASSCOM GCC 2024: 30-40% of transactional processes automated in mature GCCs. Everest Group: leading GCCs at 50%+ automation coverage.

kpi_name: IT Infrastructure Cost per FTE (₹ Lakh/year)
source: Everest Group GCC 2024: Technology infrastructure 10-15% of GCC cost base divided by FTE count. Best-in-class: ₹1.2-1.5L/FTE with shared cloud platform.
